title: Young Chopin
writer: Gustaw Bachner, Jerzy Broszkiewicz, Aleksander Ford
actors: Czeslaw Wollejko, Zbigniew Lobodzinski, Józef Nieweglowski
plot: A story of the formative years in Chopin's life between 1825 and 1831, a time of social unrest throughout Europe, of rising nationalism, and of cries for reform. Chopin, an outstanding student in music, and inflamed with the revol...
